name: Remediation Action
description: Execute or recommend a remediation action for a detected anomaly. This tool can trigger automated remediation workflows (pipeline reset, service restart, failover) or generate a structured remediation plan for manual execution by the operations team. All actions are logged for audit trail compliance.

channel.description: The fault channel number (1-20) that this remediation addresses.

action_type.description: Type of remediation action. 'recommend' generates a plan without executing. Other actions trigger automated workflows.

target_service.description: The service to apply the remediation to. Required for restart_service and failover_service actions.

target_subsystem.description: The subsystem to apply the remediation to. Required for isolate_subsystem action.

severity_override.description: Override the severity classification for the remediation. Used when the agent determines a different severity than the default.

justification.description: Free-text justification for the remediation action. Required for escalate_to_operator and request_hold actions.

dry_run.description: If true, simulate the action without executing it. Returns what would happen.
